## triggerSyncDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `sync` command.

Drives CLI subcommand `sync` and MCP tool `sync_trigger`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
triggerSyncDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{}, SyncResult, z.ZodObject<{}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {}, {}>>
```
